text.title: Audience OKR Template (Indie) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Founder has ≥10 active users in a defined audience segment?

branch.question: Quarterly planning cadence exists AND ≥1 measurable metric per segment?
